Sweep AI

AI junior developer that handles GitHub issues

6/10Overall Rating
7/10Ease of Use
$480/moStarting Price
2023Founded
Free Plan Available

About Sweep AI

Sweep AI is a ai coding platform founded in 2023. It positions itself as “AI junior developer that handles GitHub issues” and is best suited for teams with large issue backlogs, automating simple code changes. Pricing starts at $480/mo, and a free plan is available.

Features

FeatureAvailable
AutocompleteNo
Code GenerationYes
Code ReviewYes
DebuggingYes
RefactoringYes
Test GenerationNo
Multi LanguageYes
Ide IntegrationNo
ChatNo
DocumentationNo

Pros & Cons

Pros

  • Automates GitHub issue resolution
  • Creates PRs automatically
  • Good for repetitive tasks

Cons

  • Expensive for teams
  • Only works with GitHub
  • Struggles with complex issues
